name: Places VR: The Statue of Liberty

reviews.review_description:
I don’t know when they did it, but they added torch access!!!  So sweet! There is even a little surprise!

Definitely BUY IT.  The game is worth the price.  I love it.

So why only 4 stars then?

There is still some stuff missing. (This in no way makes this a bad experience.)

I have been to the island, and was surprised to find this game in my feed on FB.  

After the tutorial I couldn’t wait to explore the island, again!

I instantly noticed that there are two huge fields where there should be buildings.  A museum, the cafe, and the gift shops.

Since my first review they have added a building. I believe it is an information center. I assume this will be more content for the future. The buildings aren’t needed. I get it. But a fake store, and the real museum would have filled in the empty space nicely.
  
It is very nice to see the developers taking this game seriously, and updating it.

There is a museum at the base of the statue, but I was never in there in reality, so idk if this is how it is.  But I assume it is.

Going into the statue, and all the look outs are neat.  The spiral staircase made me want to throw up lol but it was fine.  I never realized how the crown was.  It was so cool to see it.

But please try this.  It is a great game!  You WILL love it!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment — both this one and the previous one. Your earlier feedback was truly helpful! We continue to improve the VR tour, and we're very happy to hear that you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description:
Graphics are not great but enough to enjoy this tour. I really liked its history.
There is a small game with a final surprise.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! You’re probably referring to the statuette collection mini-game, where you get a special Air Show as a reward for finding them all. I hope you enjoyed it — we’re very proud of that part.

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this a lot, as i’m older and will never get that close to touring the statue of liberty, this was great. My legs don’t hurt from climbing all those stairs. Great job by the developers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! Our goal was to recreate the feeling of a real Statue of Liberty visit as closely as possible, so I’m really glad you had a great experience.

reviews.review_description: Cool experience  so cool learn about statue of Liberty  great story’s but I got say the graphics are kinda glitchy but other then that great work devs I love New York￼￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! Positive feedback like yours truly makes our day. Knowing that our hard work brings joy to players is the best reward.
By the way, we’re currently preparing an update that will open access to the Torch — we hope you’ll enjoy it! 😊

reviews.review_description:
I hate traveling but I want to see the world. This kind of app is exactly what I've looked for. Tour the statue at your own pace with an audio guide. Standing at the base and looking up gives you the appropriate sense of awe (even made me tear up a little for reasons). 

I took one star off because it might not have the best replayability. Graphics are also not AAA and I started feeling a little swimmy by the end. Still a great experience and a great way to show off VR to someone else who would like to visit the statue. 

I would love more locations, like Michelangelo's David (or even a whole museum), the Egyptian pyramids, Machu Pichu, I mean, so many possibilities. I really hope other places are in the works from this dev!

developer_response.body:
Thank you sincerely for taking a moment to share your impressions. At this early stage of the game, there aren’t many reviews yet, so every piece of feedback is twice as valuable—it helps us grow and quietly guides those still deciding whether to embark on this VR journey. Thank you!

We’re still polishing Places VR: The Statue of Liberty, but we’re also eager to create VR tours of other iconic Places, including the ones you mentioned!

reviews.review_description:
It’s a game, I didn’t know it 
I didn’t like it, I should’ve waited for more reviews 
I thought it was like wander,where you can really see the statue of Liberty
It’s a game, ￼I don’t want to play no game

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear it wasn’t what you expected. Places VR: The Statue of Liberty is more of an interactive VR experience than a traditional game — you can freely walk around Liberty Island, go inside the statue, discover hidden collectibles, and listen to an immersive audio tour. Unlike watching panoramas, our app gives you the feeling of really being there — walking around freely and experiencing the true scale of the monument from the ground and from within. If you’re into virtual exploration with a bit of interactivity, it might still be worth giving it another try!

reviews.review_description: Very educational and immersive learning about the statue of liberty would recommend if you wanna visit and learn about the statue

developer_response.body: Thank you for the warm feedback! 😊 We're very happy to hear that you enjoyed the immersive atmosphere and the educational aspect of the game. Glad the experience was both useful and interesting for you!

reviews.review_description: A really cool tour for anyone who'd like to visit this remarkable landmark on his couch. Would recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're really glad you enjoyed the tour and found it educational. Appreciate the recommendation! 🙌🗽
